## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link related issues: Fixes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] If `src/` changed: `npm run build` was run and the updated `dist/` is staged (CI enforces freshness)
- [ ] If the CLI surface changed: result shape added/updated in `src/types.ts`, and `commands/*.md` / `skills/session-porter/SKILL.md` updated
- [ ] If a new JSONL entry variant was added: `src/types.ts` and `tests/fixtures/` both updated
